Table	Create Table
reminders	CREATE TABLE `reminders` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `studentId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `lessonId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `paymentDueId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `templateId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `type` enum('aula','cobranca','inadimplencia','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pendente','enviado','cancelado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `autoGenerated` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sentAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `refId` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `reminders_refId_unique` (`refId`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin AUTO_INCREMENT=30001
